feed.title: Dividend Research — T.TO (TELUS) Primary Pick
feed.detail: Scanned full TSX dividend universe. Most stalwarts (ENB, FTS, PPL, TRP, BNS) near all-time or 52-week highs. Primary pick: TELUS (T.TO) at ~$18 CAD — near 52-week lows, 15% below 5-yr avg, 9.2% yield, record 2025 FCF $2.2B (+11% YoY), 21%+ analyst upside. Dividend frozen not cut. Report sent to Telegram.
